description: Planned dynamic-data seed fixture contract for local OSH populated Observation/Command binding closure.
createdFor: S-ETS-33-01 local OSH dynamic-data seed fixture planning
notes: This manifest is a planning contract, not proof that these payload shapes have been accepted by OSH.
Generator must only apply dynamic-data fixtures under explicit dedicated mutable-IUT opt-in.
The official Part 2 OpenAPI schemas mark some readOnly fields as required, so Generator must discover accepted OSH write shape before recording exact payloads.
Credential values must never be stored in this manifest, repository docs, or archived logs.
Sprint 34 verifies Sapient as an isolated local command-ack fixture, but Sapient-generated streams are not accepted as persistent seed state because they fail broader Part 2 schema validation.

Sprint 35 verifies SimUAV as an isolated local command/result fixture, but SimUAV-generated streams are not accepted as persistent seed state because local OSH omits schema-required stream metadata and serves schema bodies with Content-Type auto.

Sprint 38 verifies a reproducible SimUAV preseed/probe path and populated parent candidate selection. The fixture provides dynamic parent resources and a waypoint Command POST that completes, but still does not provide parseable Observation child collections, nested Command collections, dereferenceable CommandStatus/CommandResult URLs, strict schema media types, or exact SWE text schema responses.

mutationSafety.targetPolicy: Only a dedicated non-public mutable local OSH or equivalent dedicated mutable IUT may receive dynamic-data seed mutations.

dynamicCollections./commands?limit=5: HTTP 400 application/json with invalid resource name

currentPlanningProbe.optionsObservation: Dynamic collection paths advertise broad write methods, but planning did not issue mutating requests.

acceptedObservationSeedShape.result: Accepted with HTTP 201 for DataStream and Observation; cleanup returned HTTP 204 for both resources.

acceptedControlStreamSeedShape.result: Accepted with HTTP 201 and returned inspectable /controlstreams/{id}/schema evidence; cleanup returned HTTP 204.

blockedCommandSeedShape.result: Both attempts timed out waiting for OSH command acknowledgement; /controlstreams/{id}/commands remained empty, so no Command, CommandStatus, or CommandResult fixture evidence can be claimed.

generatorDiscovery.positiveClosureDisposition: Observation-side seed shape is discovered, Sprint 34 proves acknowledged Command evidence through an isolated Sapient driver fixture, and Sprint 35 proves acknowledged Command plus inline result evidence through an isolated SimUAV driver fixture. Full REQ-ETS-PART2-013 populated-IUT closure remains open until acknowledged Command evidence can coexist with schema-valid DataStream/ControlStream representations and inspectable JSON parent schema resources.

taskingDriverFixture.disposition: Use Sapient only as an isolated tasking fixture. Disable Sapient autostart, reset the OSH datastore, and reseed static 040g fixtures before primary TeamEngine smoke.

simUavTaskingDriverFixture.disposition: Use SimUAV only as an isolated tasking/result fixture. Disable SimUAV autostart, reset the OSH datastore, and reseed static 040g fixtures before primary TeamEngine smoke.

remainingBlockers: Observation child collections return HTTP 200 application/json with empty bodies instead of parseable items arrays.
Nested Command collection returns HTTP 200 application/json with an empty body after waypoint Command POST.
POST response command@id is not dereferenceable through /commands/{id}, /commands/{id}/status, or /commands/{id}/result.
Some schema endpoints still return Content-Type auto and some SWE text schema requests return HTTP 400.
simUavPreseededPopulatedFixture.disposition: Use SimUAV preseed only as a dedicated populated E2E probe. It is not a full positive binding fixture until OSH exposes child-body and schema media-type evidence. Disable SimUAV autostart, reset OSH data, and reseed static 040g fixtures before primary clean smoke.

plannedSeedSequence.purpose: Parent schema evidence for Observation binding.
Child body evidence for Observation binding.
Parent schema evidence for Command binding.
Child parameter evidence for Command binding.
Optional inline or linked status evidence for Command binding.
Optional inline or linked result evidence for Command binding.

positiveClosureRequires: Live parent schema evidence from local OSH or documented pre-existing local OSH resources.
Live child body evidence associated with that parent.
Concrete field/name/type overlap between parent schema and child body.
Inline CommandStatus/CommandResult helper regressions covering skip and mismatch behavior.
TeamEngine E2E artifacts and no-mutation comparison evidence.
